--- memory ---
GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
  GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
    GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
        GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
            GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                GpuFilterExec: row_width=4, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
                  GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8
                    GpuScanExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
            GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
                GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=104

                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=104
                        GpuFilterExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=104

                            GpuScanExec: row_width=68, subtree_max_row_bytes=68
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=28, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
